title: Scala | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Scala

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/scala/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

Discover and update the Scala-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in the project **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **Scala**.

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/scala/#related-pages "Related pages")

- [External Analyzer Reports](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/enriching/external-analyzer-reports/ "External Analyzer Reports") (Scalastyle or Scapegoat)
- [Test Coverage](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/enriching/test-coverage/overview/ "Test Coverage") (Scoverage)
